verse_text: Now when all was completed, all Israel who were present went out to the cities of Judah and broke the sacred pillars in pieces, cut down the groves, and cast down the high places and the altars—from all Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh—until they utterly destroyed them all. Then all the sons of Israel returned to their own possessions and their own cities.

links.context: King Hezekiah destroyed the idols in Jerusalem temporarily (see [[2CH.31:1]]; 4Kg 18:4); but Christ will permanently destroy the idolatry of sin for all mankind.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
